title: Dialectic Lab
public_claim: The Dialectic Lab (canonical Room ID dialectic-lab, display name "Dialectic Lab", experiential title "The Democratic Dialectic Chamber") is a MuranoOS room for a specific authorial project: a high-density, poetically interwoven, philosophically and historically serious corpus on democracy, authoritarianism, war, evil, America, memory, and vocation.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Dialectic Lab, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
